name: Toddler Kids' Pegasus Comforter - Pillowfort™: Multicolored Animal Print, Cotton, Polyester Fill, Machine Washable
description: Add sweet, mythical charm to your little one's sleeping nook with this Kids' Pegasus Comforter from Pillowfort™. The 100% cotton shell ensures soft, comfortable year-round use, while the cozy comforter with polyester fill adds a layer of warmth to the top of their bed. Best of all, you can toss it in the washing machine for easy cleanup whenever needed. Designed in a pink hue, this decorative comforter features colorful pegasus, fairies, castles and floral graphics for sweet, whimsical flair.
